content: - 感知机是二分类线性分类模型，属于判别模型
- 感知机学习分为原始形式和对偶形式

\[
s i g n (x) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} + 1, & x \geq 0 \\ - 1, & x <   0 \end{array} \right.
\]

latex: \begin{array} { r } { f ( x ) = s i g n ( w \cdot x + b ) } \end{array}

content: - 对应于特征空间 \(R^n\) 的超平面S，w为超平面的法向量，b是超平面的截距，超平面将特征空间划分为两个部分，表示正、负类：

latex: - y _ { i } ( w \cdot x _ { i } + b ) > \mathbf { 0 }
- \frac { 1 } { \| w \| } y _ { i } ( \pmb { w } \cdot \pmb { x } _ { i } + \pmb { b } )

content: (2) 在训练集中选取数据 \( (x_{i}, y_{i}) \)
(4)转至(2)，直至训练集中没有误分类点。

latex: x _ { i } \in \mathcal { X } = R ^ { n } , y _ { i } \in \mathcal { Y } = \{ + 1 , - 1 \} , i = 1 , 2 , \ldots N
\pmb { f } ( \pmb { x } ) = s i g \pmb { n } ( \pmb { w } \cdot \pmb { x } + \pmb { b } )
y _ { i } ( w \cdot x _ { i } + b ) \leq \mathbf { 0 }
\mathrm { s i g n } ( w \cdot x + b )
\operatorname* { m i n } _ { w , b } { \cal L } ( w , b ) = - \sum _ { x _ { i } \in { \cal M } } y _ { i } ( w \cdot x _ { i } + b )
\mathbf { \partial } \cdot x _ { 1 } = ( 3 , 3 ) ^ { T } , y _ { 1 } ( w _ { 0 } \cdot x _ { 1 } + b _ { 0 } ) = \mathbf { 0 }
\mathbf { \partial } \cdot x _ { 3 } = ( 1 , 1 ) ^ { T } , y _ { 3 } ( \pmb { w } _ { 1 } \cdot x _ { 3 } + b _ { 1 } ) = - 7 < \mathbf { 0 }
{ \pmb f } ( { \pmb x } ) = s i g { \pmb n } ( { \pmb x } ^ { ( 1 ) } + { \pmb x } ^ { ( 2 ) } - { \pmb 3 } )
\widehat { \boldsymbol { x } } = ( \boldsymbol { x } ^ { T } , \boldsymbol { 1 } ) ^ { T } , \widehat { \boldsymbol { x } } \in R ^ { n + 1 } \widehat { \boldsymbol { w } } \in R ^ { n + 1 }

content:
\[
\boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\widehat {\boldsymbol {w}} _ {o p t} \cdot \widehat {\boldsymbol {x}}\right) = \boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\boldsymbol {w} _ {o p t} \cdot \boldsymbol {x} + \boldsymbol {b} _ {o p t}\right) \geq \gamma
\]

latex: x _ { i } \in \mathcal { X } = R ^ { n } , y _ { i } \in \mathcal { Y } = \{ + 1 , - 1 \} , i = 1 , 2 , \ldots N
\widehat { w } _ { o p t } \cdot \widehat { \pmb { x } } = w _ { o p t } \pmb { x } +
R = \operatorname* { m a x } _ { 1 \leq i \leq N } \| \widehat { \pmb x } _ { i } \|

content:
\[
\widehat {\boldsymbol {w}} _ {o p t} \cdot \widehat {\boldsymbol {x}} = \boldsymbol {w} _ {o p t} \cdot \boldsymbol {x} + \boldsymbol {b} _ {o p t} = 0, \text {使} \left\| \widehat {\boldsymbol {w}} _ {o p t} \right\| = 1,
\]

\[
\boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\widehat {\boldsymbol {w}} _ {o p t} \cdot \widehat {\boldsymbol {x}}\right) = \boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\boldsymbol {w} _ {o p t} \cdot \boldsymbol {x} + \boldsymbol {b} _ {o p t}\right) \geq 0
\]

\[
\boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\widehat {\boldsymbol {w}} _ {o p t} \cdot \widehat {\boldsymbol {x}}\right) = \boldsymbol {y} _ {i} \left(\boldsymbol {w} _ {o p t} \cdot \boldsymbol {x} + \boldsymbol {b} _ {o p t}\right) \geq \gamma
\]

latex: \gamma = \operatorname* { m i n } _ { i } \{ y _ { i } ( w _ { o p t } \cdot x + b _ { o p t } ) \}

content:
\[
\widehat {w} _ {k} \cdot \widehat {w} _ {o p t} \geq \widehat {w} _ {k - 1} \cdot \widehat {w} _ {o p t} + \eta \gamma \geq \widehat {w} _ {k - 2} \cdot \widehat {w} _ {o p t} + 2 \eta \gamma \geq k \eta \gamma
\]

latex: \widehat { w } _ { k } \cdot \widehat { w } _ { o p t } \geq k \eta \gamma
\widehat { w } _ { k } = \widehat { w } _ { k - 1 } + \eta y _ { i } \widehat { x } _ { i }
y _ { i } \left( \widehat { w } _ { o p t } \cdot \widehat { \mathbf { x } } \right) = y _ { i } \left( w _ { o p t } \cdot { x } + b _ { o p t } \right) \geq \gamma
\widehat { \pmb { w } } _ { k } = \widehat { \pmb { w } } _ { k - 1 } + \eta y _ { i } \widehat { \pmb { x } } _ { i }

content:
\[
k \eta \gamma \leq \widehat {w} _ {k} \cdot \widehat {w} _ {o p t} \leq \| \widehat {w} _ {k} \| \| \widehat {w} _ {o p t} \| \leq \sqrt {k} \eta R
\]
- 基本想法：将w和b表示为实例 \(x_{i}\) 和标记 \(y_{i}\) 的线性组合的形式，通过求解其系数而求得w和b。

latex: \begin{array} { r } { \mathrm { n } = \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { N } n _ { i } } \end{array}
w = \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { N } \alpha _ { i } y _ { i } x _ { i } ~ b = \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { N } \alpha _ { i } y _ { i }
x _ { i } \in \mathcal { X } = R ^ { n } , y _ { i } \in \mathcal { Y } = \{ + 1 , - 1 \} , i = 1 , 2 , \ldots N

- Gram矩阵: 训练实例仅以内积的形式出现，可以预先计算，存储为矩阵形式。

latex: \begin{array} { r } { y _ { i } \big ( \sum _ { j = 1 } ^ { N } \alpha _ { j } y _ { j } x _ { j } \cdot x _ { i } + b \big ) \le 0 } \end{array}
\begin{array} { r } { { \bf \nabla } y _ { i } \big ( \sum _ { j = 1 } ^ { N } \alpha _ { j } y _ { j } x _ { j } \cdot x _ { i } + b \big ) \le { \bf 0 } } \end{array}
\alpha _ { i }  \alpha _ { i } + 1 , b  b + y _ { i }
y _ { i } \big ( \textstyle \sum _ { j = 1 } ^ { N } \alpha _ { j } y _ { j } x _ { j } \cdot x _ { i } + b \big ) \le 0
\alpha _ { i }  \alpha _ { i } + 1 , b  b + y _ { i }
{ \pmb f } ( { \pmb x } ) = s i g { \pmb n } ( { \pmb x } ^ { ( 1 ) } + { \pmb x } ^ { ( 2 ) } - { \pmb 3 } )
